memory.guidance_line: - Guidance: when the task involves knowledge accumulation, structure diagnostics, version migration, or complex task decomposition, prefer invoking the `pensieve` skill.

STR-001.message: Project-level user data root directory does not exist.
STR-001.recommendation: Run init or migrate first to create the .claude/skills/pensieve base structure.

STR-002.recommendation: Run migrate to complete directory structure, then re-run doctor.

STR-101.message: Deprecated legacy path coexists with active root directory.
STR-101.recommendation: Run migrate to move data and remove legacy paths, converging to .claude/skills/pensieve as the single root.

STR-111.recommendation: Run migrate to remove standalone graph files; the graph should only exist in SKILL.md#Graph.

STR-121.message: Legacy spec README copy found in project-level subdirectory.
STR-121.recommendation: Run migrate to remove this copy; the canonical spec is at <SYSTEM_SKILL_ROOT>/*/README.md.

STR-201.recommendation: Run migrate to force-align critical files.

STR-202.message: Critical file body content differs from template (context link value differences are ignored).
STR-202.recommendation: Run migrate to back up then replace, restoring the critical workflow file body to match the template.

STR-301.message: Review pipeline still references plugin-internal Knowledge path.
STR-301.recommendation: Run migrate to switch references to the project-level .claude/skills/pensieve/knowledge/... path.

STR-401.message: Failed to parse settings.json, cannot fully validate enabledPlugins: {err}
STR-401.recommendation: Fix the settings.json syntax and retry.

STR-402.message: Legacy plugin key is still enabled in enabledPlugins.
STR-402.recommendation: Run upgrade to clean up legacy keys, keeping only pensieve@kingkongshot-marketplace.

STR-403.message: New plugin key is missing or not enabled in enabledPlugins.
STR-403.recommendation: Run upgrade to write pensieve@kingkongshot-marketplace: true.

STR-501.message: Missing Claude Code auto memory entry file MEMORY.md.
STR-501.recommendation: Run init/migrate/doctor to trigger auto memory creation, or manually write the Pensieve guidance block in ~/.claude/projects/<project>/memory/MEMORY.md.

STR-502.message: MEMORY.md is missing the Pensieve description or its content is not aligned with the system skill description.
STR-502.recommendation: Run init/migrate/doctor to trigger auto memory alignment, ensuring ~/.claude/projects/<project>/memory/MEMORY.md matches the skill description and includes the pensieve skill guidance.

STR-901.message: Required scan template is missing, cannot complete validation: {detail}
STR-901.recommendation: Fix the plugin installation or update to the full version and retry.
